patterns.message: Import design-system components from 'index.js', not component internals.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Raw hex color — use a design-system color token via var().
Raw px value — use a design-system spacing token via var().
Font not provided by the design system. Available: Geist, Geist Mono.
<Avatar> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, src, size, shape, style.
<Avatar> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | '2xl'.
<Avatar> shape must be one of 'circle' | 'square'.
<Button> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, type, intent, size, disabled, loading, round, block, iconLeft, iconRight, onClick, style, title.
<Button> type must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'plain'.
<Button> intent must be one of 'none' | 'danger' | 'interactive'.
<Button> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Checkbox> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: checked, defaultChecked, onChange, label, disabled, indeterminate, style.
<Dialog> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: open, onClose, title, children, footer, width, danger, confirmLabel, cancelLabel, onConfirm, style.
<Icon> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: name, size, strokeWidth, color, style, className.
<IconButton> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: icon, type, intent, size, round, disabled, onClick, title, style.
<IconButton> type must be one of 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'ghost'.
<IconButton> intent must be one of 'none' | 'danger' | 'interactive'.
<IconButton> size must be one of 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<Input> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onChange, placeholder, size, label, help, error, disabled, prefixIcon, suffixIcon, clearable, type, style.
<Input> size must be one of 'xs' | 'md' | 'lg'.
<PostCard> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: author, topic, time, verified, verifiedKind, title, children, media, votes, comments, reposts, views, onFollowAuthor, width, style.
<PostCard> verifiedKind must be one of 'expert' | 'identity'.
<Progress> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, max, color, height, showLabel, style.
<Progress> color must be one of 'default' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning' | 'interactive'.
<SelectOption> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value.
<TabItem> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: label, value, icon, count.
<Tag> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: children, color, effect, size, rounded, icon, onRemove, style.
<Tag> color must be one of 'default' | 'brand' | 'accent' | 'interactive' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'.
<Tag> effect must be one of 'light' | 'dark' | 'plain'.
<Tag> size must be one of 'sm' | 'md'.
<TextArea> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: value, defaultValue, onChange, placeholder, label, help, error, disabled, rows, style.
<VotePill> doesn't accept that prop. Declared props: count, vote, onVote, style.
<VotePill> vote must be one of 'up' | 'down'.
